script: mkdir -p .workflow/existing-app-feature/preflight; { node --test scripts/iphone-app-factory/test-existing-app-feature-workflow-contract.mjs && node scripts/iphone-app-factory/ux-studio-preflight.mjs --server https://fabro-maestro-production.up.railway.app/api/v1 --expected-control-plane railway; } > .workflow/existing-app-feature/preflight/workflow-preflight.log 2>&1 && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const report={ok:true, artifact:'.workflow/existing-app-feature/preflight/workflow-preflight.json', log:'.workflow/existing-app-feature/preflight/workflow-preflight.log', gate:'feature-workflow-contract', next_action:'context-intake-child', failure_classification:'none'}; fs.writeFileSync(report.artifact, JSON.stringify(report,null,2)+'\n');"
command:
exec 2>&1
mkdir -p .workflow/existing-app-feature/preflight; { node --test scripts/iphone-app-factory/test-existing-app-feature-workflow-contract.mjs && node scripts/iphone-app-factory/ux-studio-preflight.mjs --server https://fabro-maestro-production.up.railway.app/api/v1 --expected-control-plane railway; } > .workflow/existing-app-feature/preflight/workflow-preflight.log 2>&1 && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const report={ok:true, artifact:'.workflow/existing-app-feature/preflight/workflow-preflight.json', log:'.workflow/existing-app-feature/preflight/workflow-preflight.log', gate:'feature-workflow-contract', next_action:'context-intake-child', failure_classification:'none'}; fs.writeFileSync(report.artifact, JSON.stringify(report,null,2)+'\n');"
